title: BIG4 Tasman Holiday Parks - Rowes Bay
description: Bright cabins & villas near Rose Bay, plus an outdoor pool, BBQ facilities & a playground.
address: 46 Heatleys Parade, Belgian Gardens QLD 4810, Australia
hotelDescription:
Overlooking Rose Bay, this relaxed property on a beachfront road is 2 km from The Strand seafront strip and 4 km from both Reef HQ aquarium and the Museum of Tropical Queensland.
 Sleeping up to 5 guests, the bright, simple cabins (some with shared bathrooms) provide free Wi-Fi, kitchenettes, and living/dining areas with flat-screen TVs, DVD players and ceiling fans; some add sea views and/or furnished terraces. The 2-bedroom villas add pull-out sofas and 2nd TVs.
 Parking is offered. Other amenities include an outdoor pool, BBQ areas and a kids' playground, plus coin-operated laundry facilities. Caravans and campsites are available.

title: Nomads Magnetic Island
description: Happening backpackers' hostel featuring beach access & a bar, plus an outdoor pool & a sundeck.
address: 1 Nelly Bay Rd, Magnetic Island QLD 4819, Australia
hotelDescription:
This lively beachfront backpackers' hostel lies next to the Nelly Bay Road near Lilac Street bus stop, and 3 km from Nelly Bay Ferry Terminal.
 The cosy mixed-gender or female-only dorms come with linens, lockers and bunk beds, plus shared bathrooms. Private rooms are also available, and some feature ocean views and en suite facilities.
 Amenities include beach access, an outdoor pool, a sundeck and a bar, as well as guest laundry facilities, a game room and bike rentals. Regular entertainment and activities are also offered.

updatesFromCustomers.text: Net terug van een WAANZINNIG MOOIE vakantie in NZ met Travel Essence. Alles was tot in de puntjes verzorgd. Onze accommodaties lagen op de meest indrukwekkende plekken met meerdere keren een fenomenaal uitzicht! Super gave excursies gedaan en alles was top geregeld!
